summary: There is no evidence indicating that TLR7 induces greater interferon production in males compared to females; instead, existing research highlights enhanced immune activity in women due to hormone influences such as estrogen. Thus, TLR7-mediated interferon induction is not higher in males.

Thus, TLR7-mediated interferon induction is not higher in males.. Answer choice: B
